mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pm_project WHERE del_flag = '0'
AND project_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{projectName}, '%')

SELECT p.project_id AS projectId, p.project_name AS projectName, u.nick_name AS projectManagerName, p.estimated_workload AS estimatedWorkload, p.adjust_workload AS adjustWorkload, d.project_stage AS projectStage, ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(d.work_hours), 0) / 8, 2) AS stageDays FROM pm_project p LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON u.user_id = p.project_manager_id AND u.del_flag = '0' LEFT JOIN pm_daily_report_detail d ON d.project_id = p.project_id AND d.del_flag = '0' LEFT JOIN pm_daily_report r ON r.report_id = d.report_id AND r.del_flag = '0' WHERE p.del_flag = '0' AND p.project_id IN ( SELECT project_id FROM ( SELECT project_id FROM pm_project WHERE del_flag = '0'
AND project_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{projectName}, '%')
ORDER BY project_id LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize} ) paged_ids ) GROUP BY p.project_id, p.project_name, u.nick_name, p.estimated_workload, p.adjust_workload, d.project_stage ORDER BY p.project_id, d.project_stage
mapper.update: UPDATE pm_project SET adjust_workload = #{adjustWorkload}, update_time = NOW() WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND del_flag = '0'
mapper.select:
SELECT DISTINCT project_id AS projectId, project_name AS projectName FROM pm_project WHERE del_flag = '0'
AND project_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY project_name LIMIT 20
